name: wan-huiyan-skill-authoring
description: Skills and troubleshooting recipes for authoring, diagnosing, and maintaining Claude Code skills. Starts with skill-trigger-eval-subprocess-blindness; designed as the home for future skill-authoring tools.

plugins.name: skill-trigger-eval-subprocess-blindness
plugins.description: Diagnose 0% recall results from skill-creator's trigger evaluation loop. Explains why introspection/audit skills appear to never fire in `run_eval.py`/`run_loop.py` even with perfect descriptions, and how to distinguish subprocess blindness from a genuinely broken description.
